title: ProDec Tub 100 Multi-Purpose Wipes
features: Lint-free, multi-purpose wipes ideal for general cleaning of paint, oil, grease, silicones, mastic and more from hands, tools and hard surfaces
Pouch of 100 wipes supplied in a handy dispenser tub with airtight clip close lid
description: Product Description Essential to have to hand on any number of jobs, these multi-purpose wipes are ideal for wiping up spots and splashes of paint, woodstain, caulk, sealants and more from hands and hard surfaces, as well as removing oil and grease. Safe and hygienic, they are supplied in a pouch of 100 that fits in a tub with an easy open/close airtight lid that enables easy dispensing and keeps the remaining wipes wet. The tub is made from 100% recyclable plastic so it can be repurposed at the end of its working life instead of going to landfill. Ingredients n/a - non-food Box Contains 100 General Purpose Wipes See more
